briefFile.label: Brief File
briefFile.help: Optional project brief or writing charter file injected into the SNC system prompt.

ledgerFile.label: Ledger File
ledgerFile.help: Optional story ledger or continuity ledger file injected on each turn.

packetFiles.label: Packet Files
packetFiles.help: Ordered list of extra context packet files to inject after the brief and ledger.

packetDir.label: Packet Directory
packetDir.help: Optional directory of .md, .txt, or .json files loaded alphabetically into the SNC packet.

stateDir.label: State Directory
stateDir.help: Optional directory where SNC stores per-session state snapshots for reuse across turns.

hooks.label: Hook Scaffold
hooks.help: Optional disabled-by-default SNC shaping and worker-lifecycle hook layer. Use this for bounded transcript shaping, tool-result previewing, and worker bookkeeping.

maxSectionBytes.label: Max Section Bytes
maxSectionBytes.help: Per-file byte cap before SNC truncates injected content.
